title: Village and a little bit of pillage
description: This datapack adds few village variants and pillager structures.
body:
Village and a little bit of pillage adds three new village variants (for now), a pillager camp and pillager fort. You can find every structure in few biomes, but will be changed in future. Datapack fully released on version 1.2. Completly fixed loot and other things. 
Little promotion: join our Discord and become on of our SMP members by adding me on Discord (doska_123), DM-ing me and I will send you an invitation.
